nasb.text: They said, “Believe in the Lord Jesus, and you will be saved, you and your household.”

esv.text: And they said, “Believe in the Lord Jesus, and you will be saved, you and your household.”

cnv.text: 他們說：“當信主耶穌，你和你一家人都必定得救。”

ccb.text: 他们说：“要信主耶稣，你和你一家就必定得救。”

csbs.text: 他们说：“要信靠主耶稣，你和你一家人就将得救。”
